narrative:
Millcreek Twp township has 505 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.4 percentage points.
